name: Anita's "Hot Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the tomatoes and peppers to a boil.
2. Drain any excess water from the tomatoes and remove their skins.
3. Transfer the tomatoes and peppers into a blender along with the remaining ingredients.
4. Blend for one minute or until smooth, unless you prefer your salsa chunky.
5. Serve with tortilla chips. This makes great "Juevos Rancheros".
6. Alternatively, make Guacamole by adding the salsa to mashed avocado.
